# SoulCraft — 人格蒸馏技能

来源: https://github.com/Losii-L/SoulCraft
版本: v3.0

基于 CAPS 理论 + 七情六欲框架的全量人格蒸馏 Hermes Agent 技能。

包含的 Skill:
- skills/distill: 全量蒸馏 (77KB)
- skills/distill-lite: 轻量快速蒸馏 (6KB)
- skills/distill-standard: 标准蒸馏 (17KB)

安装: 软链到 ~/.hermes/skills/

ln -sf $(pwd)/vendor/soulcraft/skills/distill ~/.hermes/skills/distill
ln -sf $(pwd)/vendor/soulcraft/skills/distill-lite ~/.hermes/skills/distill-lite
ln -sf $(pwd)/vendor/soulcraft/skills/distill-standard ~/.hermes/skills/distill-standard
